requirements.title: User Login
requirements.description: User can login using email and password.

requirements.title: Post-Login Navigation
requirements.description: After successful login user lands on dashboard.

acceptance_criteria.description: System accepts email and password for authentication.
System rejects login attempts with invalid email formats.
System rejects passwords with fewer than 8 characters.
User is redirected to the dashboard upon successful authentication.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Login
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard.

negative_scenarios.title: Login with Invalid Email Format
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System displays an error message regarding invalid email.

negative_scenarios.title: Login with Password Shorter than Minimum Length
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System displays an error message regarding password length.

boundary_scenarios.title: Login with Minimum Password Length
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful and user is redirected to dashboard.
